name: Every Family Has a Secret
overview: In this documentary series, much loved and celebrated actor Noni Hazlehurst meets Australians who are grappling with a family secret. Over three weeks, participants travel around the world uncovering powerful truths about themselves, their families and Australia.

trailers.title: Every Family Has A Secret S3  | Trailer | Documentary Series | AVAILABLE ON SBS/SBS ON DEMAND
